scripts.build: bun run generate && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles.css -o ../../../../dist/adi.plugins/style.css --minify && bun build src/index.ts --outdir ../../../../dist/adi.plugins --entry-naming 'web.[ext]' --format esm --minify --external '@adi-family/sdk-plugin' --external 'lit' --external 'lit/*'
